dialogues.text: Hey man, lend me $5? I'll get you back by Friday.
Help me move this couch out of my place. I'll buy you food after, swear.
dialogues.yes_response: Awesome. You grab the left side.

dialogues.text: I'm like $3 short for the pizza. You in?
dialogues.yes_response: Legend. I'll get you a slice extra.
dialogues.no_response: Guess I'm getting a small one then.

dialogues.text: Come distract Jenny while I set up her surprise party. $7 if you keep her busy for an hour.
dialogues.yes_response: Take her to the cafe. She loves that place.

dialogues.text: Gas money. $8. I drove you last time, remember?
dialogues.no_response: You know what, I remember now.

dialogues.text: Pick up my dry cleaning for me? I'll give you $6 and you can keep the change from the ticket.
dialogues.yes_response: Receipt's in my jacket pocket. Thanks bro.
dialogues.no_response: You're really going to make me go myself.

dialogues.text: I left my charger at yours. Can you go get it? $4 for the trip.
dialogues.yes_response: It's by the outlet next to the TV.
dialogues.no_response: What am I supposed to do, buy a new one?

dialogues.text: Lost my wallet at the bar. Need $6 to get home.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll pay you back double next time out.
dialogues.no_response: Guess I'm walking then. In these shoes.

dialogues.text: Cover my shift tomorrow morning? It's easy work. I'll give you $10.
dialogues.yes_response: Be there at 8. Don't be late.
dialogues.no_response: I'll call in sick I guess.

dialogues.text: Just $2 for the vending machine. Come on.
dialogues.yes_response: You're a hero. A snack hero.
